section_name: Immunity from liability for actions in good faith and without gross negligence.
text:
An insurer, its agents, the Department and its employees who act pursuant to NRS 485.313 to 485.318 , inclusive, in good faith and without gross negligence are immune from civil liability for those acts.

VIOLATIONS AND PENALTIES
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 485
##### § 485.318 — Immunity from liability for actions in good faith and without gross negligence.

An insurer, its agents, the Department and its employees who act pursuant to NRS 485.313 to 485.318 , inclusive, in good faith and without gross negligence are immune from civil liability for those acts.

VIOLATIONS AND PENALTIES

subsections.text: An insurer, its agents, the Department and its employees who act pursuant to NRS 485.313 to 485.318 , inclusive, in good faith and without gross negligence are immune from civil liability for those acts.
